calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Mar-19-2007 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:45am
Judge Pro Tem David M. Porter, clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record:
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Respondent Vaheid Hossein appears in Pro Per for United Glass; appellant David Colleen appears in Pro Per.
Judge Porter, greets the parties and explains to them there might be a conflict of interest; that he represented a party opposing Mr. Colleen in another matter. Court takes a brief recess to allow parties to confer privately about whether they want to be assigned to another judge, or allow Judge Porter to hear the case.
9:55am
Both parties inform the clerk that they have no objection to Judge Porter hearing their case.
9:58am
Court reconvenes. Parties, previously sworn, present their respective cases in the narrative.
11:15am
After the parties complete their narrative, Judge Porter has questions. The matter is then submitted. No new evidence is identified or admitted
